title: Documentation for config module
description: Update CLAUDE.md to document the new config module and config.yaml file. Add config.py to the Project Layout section. Add a new Configuration section explaining: the config file location (.orchestrator/config.yaml), how defaults work (missing file falls back to built-in defaults), the three top-level blocks (common, codex, claude), and the public API (load_config, default_config, OrchestratorConfig methods). Mention that Phase 2 and 3 will wire the config into existing modules.
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md contains a Configuration section explaining config.yaml structure and load behavior
Documentation accurately reflects the implemented config module API
